name: Chocolate Date-Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Walnuts or halved pecans - broken
1 cup Apple juice heated with 4 tbsp Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except dates and chocolate chips) into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start" (dough will seem overly soft at first).
3. Add dates and chips at the beep, 88 minutes into the cycle (33 minutes for DAK Turbo II).
